backend_facts.accumulator_precision: not exposed by the public MPS SDPA API
backend_facts.probabilities_materialized: not observable through the public MPS SDPA API

untouched_sdpa_dispatch.note: The four-row replay verifies dispatch and row independence; it does not expose the backend's internal tiling or materialization strategy.

go_no_go.criterion: GO only when an eligible real-tensor numerical candidate has strictly lower weighted-value RMSE than measured ORT CPU against untouched official output on each requested invocation; no tolerance or derived oracle decides this gate.

excluded_from_decision.adapted_pytorch_captured_output: diagnostic backend, not a candidate kernel
excluded_from_decision.float64_note: float64 is eligible because it is a measured materialized candidate

metadata.triposplat.attention_compute: float32 scores, softmax, and value accumulation; cast output to model dtype
metadata.triposplat.attention_export: exact independent head- and query-axis chunks
metadata.triposplat.validation: Run validate_dit_onnx.py; it gates untouched official complex PyTorch, adapted real PyTorch, and ONNX Runtime on identical inputs

adapted_pytorch_captured_output.peak_temporary_bytes_estimate_note: Unavailable for captured full-model backend execution.

ort_cpu_captured_output.peak_temporary_bytes_estimate_note: Unavailable for captured full-model backend execution.

untouched_official_captured_output.peak_temporary_bytes_estimate_note: Unavailable for captured full-model backend execution.

derived_softmax_internals.reason: Untouched MPS/CPU/CUDA functional SDPA exposes no logits, row maxima, exponentials, denominator, or probabilities to module hooks. These arrays are deterministically derived from exact untouched hooked normalized Q/K.
